Interface ITinNode

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control TIN nodes.

[Guid("3E541321-1132-11D2-92F7-444553540000")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITinNode : ITinElement

Returns all nodes comprising triangles sharing the specified node.
